title: Xenial Floral Italian Christmas Pudding Panettone
description: A romantic Italian dessert featuring Christmas pudding, wok-hei, and floral flavors, made in a tajine-clay vessel and shaped like a panettone, this dish is perfect for the holiday season and can be enjoyed by those with dairy-free dietary needs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together dairy-free milk and melted vegan butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased tajine-clay vessel and let it rise for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and add dried rose petals, orange zest, and Christmas pudding mix.
Shape the dough into a panettone shape and bake for 40 minutes.
Remove the panettone from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Use a kitchen torch to achieve a wok-hei effect on the surface of the panettone.
